meta.release_notes:
# Changelog
All notable changes to this model will be documented in this file.

## [Unreleased]

## [1.0.0] - 2025-04-09
### Added
- initial version of this model

### Changed
n/a

### Removed

nodes.label: QualityCore
nodes.description: This semantic model serves as library for other Catena-X models from Catena-X Quality Management. It ensures that same properties that are used in different models are defined in the same way. Please keep in mind: Due to the nature of a library all given example values are only for illustration and might not make sense from a domain-specific view.

nodes.label: general
nodes.description: Bundling general properties that do not belong to parts or vehicles.

nodes.label: metaInformation
nodes.description: This meta information is valid for all entries in this data set. The meta information is used to tell the data consumer which selection criteria were applied by the data provider.

nodes.label: part
nodes.description: Bundling part/component properties. A part/component is meant as one piece in a vehicle. The terms part and component are synonymes.

nodes.label: plant
nodes.description: Bundling plant/production properties.

nodes.label: vehicle
nodes.description: Bundling vehicle/car properties like anonymizedVIN or mileage counter.

nodes.label: workshop
nodes.description: Groups workshop-related properties

nodes.label: qualityTaskId
nodes.description: A unique quality task identifier within this data-space.

nodes.label: countryCode
nodes.description: Country code in  ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 codes where this session took place

nodes.label: hexValue
nodes.description: Hex values are encoded in 0-9,a-f or A-F to store information.

nodes.label: recordStatus
nodes.description: The record operation enumeration can be used to realize delta update concept. An example using scenario that data delivery runs weekly: Week0: All data is transferred -> all rows have recordStatus=new. Week1: Only the changed data is transferred: That means new rows, or updated or deleted rows: New rows get recordStatus=new, changed rows get recordStatus=changed and deleted/removed rows get recordStatus=deleted.

nodes.label: sessionId
nodes.description: A unique identifier for a session. If you combine the session property with BPNL of data provider than you get a unique identifier for this session in this data-space.

nodes.label: supplierId
nodes.description: A unique identifier for one supplier inside data provider's company. If you combine supplier ID with BPNL of data provider you get a unique identifier for this supplier in this data space. As an alternative you can use BPNL to identify a supplier.

nodes.label: supplierName
nodes.description: The name of one supplier company.

nodes.label: additionalInformationList
nodes.description: You can use this key:value list for additional properties that were not defined in this aspect model.

nodes.label: selectionCriteria
nodes.description: Describes the selection criteria a Catena-X data provider has applied to create this data set.

nodes.label: selectionStart
nodes.description: Describes the starting point for providing records in this data set.

nodes.label: selectionEnd
nodes.description: Describes the end point for providing records in this data set.

nodes.label: partName
nodes.description: The name of a part. A part name is not unique - same kinds of parts can have the same part name.

nodes.label: partDescription
nodes.description: A textual description of the part.

nodes.label: assemblyPartNumberVersion
nodes.description: Often vehicle manufacturer specific: An assembly part number version. Assembly parts are often produced by a supplier that combines his own parts with other parts from other suppliers and ships as one assembly to a vehicle manufacturer.

nodes.label: batchNumber
nodes.description: A batch number describes all parts that were manufactured in the same run.

nodes.label: calibrationInformation
nodes.description: Calibration for this ECU. This could be the result of a calibration process.

nodes.label: partId
nodes.description: A unique part identifier in this data-space. Property is optional as of now not all parts have this identifier.

nodes.label: dataMatrixCode
nodes.description: String that is encoded in a data matrix code. Data matrix codes or short DMC are labelled/printed on parts. Example: A data matrix code can combine supplier name, part type, manufacturing and many more information. A DMC string is often unique within this data provider.

nodes.label: deliveryNote
nodes.description: The delivery note of a package. A delivery note is unique within one logistics company.

nodes.label: hwVersion
nodes.description: The hardware version of this part.

nodes.label: orderNumber
nodes.description: The order number of this order. This is a unique identifier defined by the supplier of the order. If you combine order number and BPNL of the supplier you get a unique identifier in this data-space.

nodes.label: partNumber
nodes.description: The number of a physical part. A part number is not unique - same kinds of parts can have same part numbers. Part numbers and part description normally relate to each other.

nodes.label: partVersion
nodes.description: The version of this hardware part.

nodes.label: serialNumber
nodes.description: Serial number of one specific part. A serial number is unique within one company. If you combine serial number with BPNL of that company than you get a unique identifier for this part in this data-space.

nodes.label: swPartNumber
nodes.description: Software number installed in this electronic control unit.

nodes.label: swVersion
nodes.description: Software version installed in this electronic control unit.

nodes.label: variantInfomation
nodes.description: An electronic control unit has many parameters that have to be set to work correctly: Examples are target market (which functions need to be activated for the target market) or the equipment of the vehicle (e.g. navigation system is installed).

nodes.label: plantIdentifier
nodes.description: Identifier of a plant within the company owning the plant. If you combing plant identifier with BPNL of the company owning the plant than you get a unique identifier fo this plant in this data-space.

nodes.label: plantDescription
nodes.description: Long name of the production plant.

nodes.label: plantBPNS
nodes.description: A unique plant identifier according BPNS definition. This property is optional as of now not all plants have assigned BPNS identifiers.

nodes.label: plantCountryCode
nodes.description: Country code of the plant, where the vehicle was produced.

nodes.label: anonymizedVIN
nodes.description: Vehicle manufacturer-specific anonymized VIN, which is still a unique identifier within this data provider.

nodes.label: vehicleId
nodes.description: A unique identifier for this vehicle in data-space. This property is optional as of now not all vehicles have this identifier assigned.

nodes.label: mileage
nodes.description: The mileage counter in the car. Only positive numbers are allowed.

nodes.label: mileageUnit
nodes.description: Enumeration to define the unit of measure for mileage counter: Either kilometer (SI standard) or miles.

nodes.label: productionDate
nodes.description: Production Date of the vehicle in The sold date of the vehicle in ISO8601 local date notation - see java.time.format.ISO_LOCAL_DATE.

nodes.label: soldDate
nodes.description: The sold date of the vehicle in ISO notation.

nodes.label: workShopId
nodes.description: A unique identifier for a workshop. This identifier is unique within data provider's company. If you combine this identifier with BPNL from data provider than you get a unique identifier for this workshop in this data space.

nodes.label: latitude
nodes.description: Latitude property for GPS coordinates.

nodes.label: longitude
nodes.description: Longitude property for GPS coordinates.

nodes.label: key
nodes.description: Key identifier for this additional information

nodes.label: value
nodes.description: Value for this additional information

nodes.label: GeneralInformationCharacteristic
nodes.description: General information characteristic

nodes.label: MetaCharacteristic
nodes.description: Characteristic for the meta information.

nodes.label: PartCharacteristic
nodes.description: Part characteristic

nodes.label: PlantCharacteristic
nodes.description: Plant characteristic

nodes.label: VehicleCharacteristic
nodes.description: Vehicle characteristic

nodes.label: WorkshopCharacteristic
nodes.description: Groups all workshop properties.

nodes.label: UniqueID
nodes.description: This Characteristic is linked to a property that is unique. Please see description of the linked property to get more details about uniqueness.

nodes.label: CountryCodeCharacteristic
nodes.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 ? three-letter country codes

nodes.label: HexCodeCharacteristic
nodes.description: Describing a hex code: 0-9, a-f, A-F, optional 0x

nodes.label: Integer
nodes.description: An integer number.

nodes.label: Float
nodes.description: Characteristic of a float value.

nodes.label: General
nodes.description: Bundling general properties that do not belong to parts or vehicles.

nodes.label: MetaInformation
nodes.description: Meta information properties give hints for a Catena-X data consumer to better understand, how this data set was created on the Catena-X data provider side.

nodes.label: Part
nodes.description: A collection of part/component properties. A Catena-X data provider should provide the  properties that are useful for a Catena-X data consumer to clearly identify the part/component. For example, this can be done by using a serial number, data matrix code or delivery note

nodes.label: Plant
nodes.description: Bundling plant/production properties.

nodes.label: Vehicle
nodes.description: Bundling vehicle/car properties like anonymizedVIN or mileage counter.

nodes.label: WorkshopProperties
nodes.description: All properties to clearly identify a workshop.

nodes.label: AdditionalInformation
nodes.description: One key:value information pair

nodes.label: CountryCodeTrait
nodes.description: This trait ensures a 3 characters country code.

nodes.label: HexValueTrait
nodes.description: This trait allows 0-9, a-f, A-F in a string value. Optional prefix is "0x".

nodes.label: ISO8601LocalDate
nodes.description: As defined in java.time.format.ISO_LOCAL_DATE without timezone.

nodes.label: LatitudeTrait
nodes.description: Trait to define the latitude.

nodes.label: LongitudeTrait
nodes.description: Trait to define the longitude.

nodes.label: RecordStatusEnumeration
nodes.description: Defining the enumeration for the record status

nodes.label: MileageUnit
nodes.description: Either km or mi.

nodes.label: AdditionalInformationList
nodes.description: A list of additional information.

nodes.label: CountryCodeRegularExpression
nodes.description: Regular Expression that ensures a three-letter code

nodes.label: HexRegularExpression
nodes.description: This regular expression enforces a hex string. It ensures 0-9, a-f, A-F with an optional prefix 0x. Valid examples: 0x0123456789abcdefABCDEF, 0123456789abcdefABCDEF

nodes.label: DateRegularExpressionNullable
nodes.description: This regular expressions enforces a given date according ISO 8601 local date. General format is YYYY-MM-DD. YYYY can be 0000..9999. MM-DD is checked together: months 01,03,05,07,08,10,12 must have DD in the range of  01..31 days, months 04,06,09,11 must have DD in the range of  01..30 days, month 02 must have DD in the range of  01..29 days.

nodes.label: MileageRangeConstraint
nodes.description: Range for a valid mileage counter. -1 marks not available.
